ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Toasted wheat flakes (72%) (wholegrain wheat, sugar, barley malt extract, salt, niacin, vitamin E, pantothenic acid (B5), iron, thiamin (B1), riboflavin (B2), pyridoxine (B6), folic acid, vitamin D, cobalamin (B12)), mixed fruits (26%) (raisins, sweetened dried banana [banana, coconut oil, sugar, flavouring], dried coconut, dried sliced apple), roasted hazelnuts (2%)
